# Global Journey Education

## About
Global Journey Education is one of the best education consultancy in Nepal. Whether you're looking to study in Australia, Canada, the UK, or beyond, we're here to guide you every step of the way. Let us help you achieve your study abroad dreams with expert advice and tailored support.

## Services
- Study in USA from Nepal
- Study in Canada from Nepal
- Study in UK from Nepal
- Study in Australia from Nepal
- Study in New Zealand from Nepal
- IELTS Preparation
- PTE Preparation
- Career Counseling
- University Selection & Application Assistance
- Documentation Guidance
- Statement of Purpose (SOP) Writing Support
- Visa Processing & Interview Preparation
- Pre-Departure Guidance

## Locations
- Putalisadak, Kathmandu, Nepal (Main Office)
- Kumaripati, Lalitpur, Nepal
- Birtamod, Jhapa, Nepal

## Contact
- Phone: +977-9843215204
- Website: https://globaljourneyedu.com.np/contact-us
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM GMT

## Service Area
Kathmandu, Lalitpur, Birtamod, and across Nepal. We assist students from all regions of Nepal planning to study abroad.

## Key Facts
- 15+ years in education consultancy
- 5000+ students guided
- 98% visa success rate
- Trusted partner for Australia, Canada, USA, UK, and New Zealand admissions
- Free initial counseling sessions
- Expert team of experienced education counselors

## What Makes Us Different
Global Journey Education combines 15+ years of experience, personalized one-on-one counseling, and a strong network of international universities and institutions. We handle everything in-house — from course and university selection, documentation, SOP preparation, test preparation (IELTS/PTE), visa processing, to pre-departure briefings. Our 98% visa success rate and 5000+ students guided speak to our dedication and expertise. We believe in full transparency — no hidden charges, and a free first counseling session for every student.

## Frequently Asked Questions

1. What services does Global Journey Education Services provide?
We offer comprehensive support for students planning to study abroad, including career counseling, university selection, application assistance, documentation guidance, test preparation (IELTS/PTE), and visa processing.

2. Which countries can I apply to through your consultancy?
We assist students in applying to popular study destinations such as Australia, Canada, the USA, the UK, and New Zealand.

3. Do I need to book an appointment for counseling?
While walk-ins may be accepted, we recommend booking an appointment in advance to receive dedicated time and personalized guidance from our counselors.

4. Is the counseling session free?
Yes, we provide initial counseling sessions free of cost to help you understand your study options and plan your journey.

5. What documents are required to apply for studying abroad?
Typical documents include academic transcripts, English proficiency test scores (IELTS/PTE), passport, Statement of Purpose (SOP), and recommendation letters. Our team will guide you through the exact requirements based on your chosen country and course.

6. Do you help with IELTS or PTE preparation?
Yes, we provide test preparation support for exams like IELTS and PTE to help you achieve the required scores for admission and visa approval.

7. How long does the application and visa process take?
The timeline varies depending on the country, university, and intake. On average, it may take a few weeks for admission and several weeks to a few months for visa processing.

8. Can you help me choose the right course and university?
Absolutely. Our experienced counselors assess your academic background, interests, and career goals to recommend the most suitable programs and institutions.

9. What is a Statement of Purpose (SOP), and do you assist with it?
An SOP is a personal essay required by universities and visa offices. Yes, we provide expert guidance to help you create a strong and effective SOP.

10. Do you provide visa interview preparation?
Yes, we offer interview preparation sessions to help you confidently face embassy interviews and improve your chances of visa approval.

11. Are there any hidden charges?
We believe in transparency. All costs and service fees will be clearly explained before you proceed.

12. Do you provide pre-departure guidance?
Yes, we conduct pre-departure sessions to prepare you for life abroad, including travel, accommodation, and cultural adjustment.

13. Where is your office located?
Our main office is located in Putalisadak, Kathmandu, with additional branches in Kupendole, Lalitpur and Birtamod, Nepal.

14. How can I contact you?
You can reach us through our website contact form at https://globaljourneyedu.com.np/contact-us, by phone at +977-9843215204, or by visiting our office directly.

15. Why should I choose Global Journey Education Services?
We combine experience, personalized counseling, and a strong network of international institutions to guide students toward the best academic opportunities abroad. With a 98% visa success rate and 5000+ students guided, we are one of Nepal's most trusted education consultancies.
